message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Hesperia. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Shadow Kraken into Wild Chimera.
I can evolve Wild Chimera into Infernal Wolf.
I can evolve Shadow Basilisk into Ancient Leviathan.
I can evolve Ancient Leviathan into Storm Djinn.
I can evolve Arcane Djinn into Celestial Owlbear.
I can evolve Celestial Owlbear into Ancient Chimera.
I can evolve Wild Golem into Thunder Cyclops.
I can evolve Thunder Cyclops into Astral Tiger.
I can evolve Astral Kraken into Infernal Djinn.
I can evolve Infernal Djinn into Celestial Leviathan.
I can evolve Lunar Phoenix into Shadow Serpent.
I can evolve Shadow Serpent into Solar Griffin.
I can evolve Solar Specter into Mystic Leviathan.
I can evolve Mystic Leviathan into Crystal Basilisk.
I can evolve Crystal Minotaur into Solar Griffin.
I can evolve Solar Griffin into Solar Djinn.
I can evolve Lunar Leviathan into Ancient Kraken.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Storm Basilisk.
I can evolve Celestial Wolf into Crystal Owlbear.

I can evolve Celestial Phoenix into Thunder Specter.

I can evolve Astral Basilisk into Shadow Serpent.
I can evolve Frozen Griffin into Infernal Wolf.
I can evolve Infernal Wolf into Void Basilisk.
I can evolve Wild Chimera into Frozen Chimera.

I can evolve Storm Basilisk into Celestial Wolf.
I can evolve Celestial Wolf into Solar Wyvern.

I can evolve Infernal Minotaur into Celestial Phoenix.

I can evolve Frozen Griffin into Thunder Tiger.
I can evolve Infernal Wolf into Lunar Phoenix.
I can evolve Lunar Phoenix into Celestial Cyclops.
I can evolve Lunar Owlbear into Thunder Kraken.
I can evolve Thunder Kraken into Celestial Drake.
I can evolve Astral Serpent into Shadow Kraken.
I can evolve Shadow Kraken into Wild Titan.
I can evolve Celestial Tiger into Storm Tiger.
I can evolve Storm Tiger into Storm Kraken.
I can evolve Infernal Titan into Celestial Wyvern.
I can evolve Celestial Wyvern into Infernal Djinn.
I can evolve Lunar Hydra into Crystal Chimera.
I can evolve Crystal Chimera into Shadow Manticore.
I can evolve Void Hydra into Thunder Serpent.
I can evolve Thunder Serpent into Shadow Wolf.
I can evolve Shadow Serpent into Celestial Kraken.

I can evolve Storm Golem into Infernal Cyclops.
Choose a beast evolution.
